---
title: "Street Medicine"
date: today
description: |
  [Description]
page-layout: full
format:
  html: 
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 200px
      body-width: 1050px
      margin-width: 250px
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

```{r Data, include=FALSE}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(plotly)
library(ggplot2)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
library(lubridate)
library(gt)
library(janitor)
library(scales)
library(apyramid)
library(kableExtra)
library(knitr)
library(zoo)
library(DT)
library(leaflet)
library(leaflet.extras)

### Street Medicine Sites
street_med_sites <- read.csv('C:/Users/braunrs/OneDrive - University of Cincinnati/Desktop/EIP Websites/eip_data/data/Street Medicine Sites.csv')
head(street_med_sites)

```


# On the Map

```{r Street Med Map, echo=FALSE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}

leaflet() %>%
  addTiles() %>%
  setView(lng = -84.5120, lat = 39.1431, zoom = 11.5) %>%
  addCircleMarkers(
    data = street_med_sites,
    color = 'red',
    label = ~site) %>%
  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldTopoMap) %>%
  addDrawToolbar()

#leaflet() %>%
#  addTiles() %>%
#  setView(lng = -84.5120, lat = 39.1431, zoom = 11.5) %>%
#  addCircleMarkers(
#    data = street_med_sites,
#    radius = ~sqrt(visits) * 5,  # scale size
#    color = 'red',
#    stroke = FALSE,
#    fillOpacity = 0.6,
#    label = ~paste0(site, " (Visits: ", visits, ")")) %>%
#  addProviderTiles(providers$Esri.WorldTopoMap) %>%
#  addDrawToolbar()

```

<div align="center">
```{r, echo = FALSE}

# Table of Street Med Sites
reactable(street_med_sites,
          columns = list(
            site = colDef(name = "Location", align = "center", width = 300),
            address = colDef(name = "Address", align = "center", width = 200),
            city = colDef(name = "City", align = "center", width = 100),
            state = colDef(name = "State", align = "center", width = 100),
            zip = colDef(name = "Zip Code", align = "center", width = 100),
            lat = colDef(name = "Latitude", align = "center", width = 100),
            lng = colDef(name = "Longitude", align = "center", width = 120),
            visits = colDef(name = "# of Visits", align = "center", width = 100)),
          bordered = TRUE,
          highlight = TRUE,
          searchable = TRUE,
          paginationType = "simple",
          defaultColDef = colDef(style = list(fontSize = "12px", maxWidth = 1500)),
          style = list(width = "100%"))

```
</div>
